title: Youngster gives comedian a run for his funny
bodyText:
GEORGE ENTERTAINMENT NEWS - The 11-year-old Jacob Janse van Rensburg surprised the audience at the Market Community Theatre - including headline act and well-known South African comedian Dalin Oliver - with his quick wit and friendly charm.

Oliver struck up some banter with Jacob, who was sitting in the front row on Saturday night, 6 September.


> The experienced comedian was met with a volley of sharp comebacks, funny stories and even a Harry Potter joke that Jacob used to unofficially open the show 90 Day Comedian.


Oliver brought his hit show to George, Knysna and Sedgefield last weekend, fresh off a successful run at the Melbourne International Comedy Festival in Australia, where it was warmly received.

Back on home soil, he wasted no time diving into the quirks and '-isms' of South African life, delivering a set of over an hour that touched the audience in many ways.

The show captured what it means to be proudly South African.

Garvin Coetzee, Ann Williams, Dalin Oliver and Charlton Williams.

Angie Ofsowitz meets Dalin Oliver after the show.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
